title: Croatian Smoked Meat Skewers
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish from Croatia, featuring smoky meat skewers that are perfect for grilling.

ingredients.name: Wood Chips (such as Hickory or Apple)

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together smoked paprika, salt, black pepper, and garlic.
Add the pork cubes, onion, and bell pepper to the bowl and toss to coat with the spice mixture.
Thread the marinated meat and vegetables onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the olive oil onto the skewers to prevent sticking.
Place the skewers directly over the heat source and close the grill lid.
Smoke the skewers for 10-15 minutes, or until the pork is cooked through and slightly charred.
During the last 5 minutes, add wood chips to the grill to infuse a smoky flavor.
Remove the skewers from the grill and let rest for 5 minutes before serving.
